title: Amity University Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Amity University Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Amity University Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Amity University Advisory Limited:
Amity University Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University Advisory Limited!
